name: Filk & Madison
description:
DAY 4

If y’all didn’t hear: I pause this event for a day, because I was sick, and it was making me drowsy, hence explains why I post Annie and Cleo too late. But, I’m feeling better now, and I can finally post on time.

A$AP Rocky might release an album yesterday, but I’m more locked in on a favorite underground artist: Dom Corleo

I wanna make this announcement, but I have decided something new that’ll take effect soon: Balanced month.

Balanced month mean that when one month focus on something, and then next month will focus on something else, and then it repeats. So this mean this:

January, March, May, July, September, November: Goonslop months (hypersized bots [like Scooge], bara, fat bots [yeah, that’s coming btw])

February, April, June, August, October, December: Normal months (Non-hypersized bots)

However, sometime, depending on the event, the month will be different for a week.

Now even though there’ll be feedbacks or criticism about it, I have decided to create a prediction of those. It may not be accurate, but it’s based on how I think it’ll be:

Person A (left): Goonslop & Normal enjoyer

Person B (middle): Normal enjoyer

Person C (right): Gooonslop enjoyer

Thoughts on Goonslop months:

Now thoughts on Normal months:

Now, as for this bot, to clear something up: Filk is the black futa bat… Yep. Not the chubby cat, the futa bat. So to the those who were excited about Filk because you thought she was the cat, you’re now getting your inside stretch by her long, massive orange dick. So lemme make this clear: Filk is the futa bat, and Madison is the chubby cat.

Oh, and you also might notice some… references in the chat. Well those references was inspired by a specific game and a specific episode I was playing yesterday.

PIC & FILK OWNED BY EPHEMERALSCOOGE, MADISON OWNED BY SOJUSPARKS

Anyway, here’s the song I was bumping to when it was released yesterday: JUMPIN - Dom Corleo (LISTEN TO IT, IT’S GOOD!!)
creator: GRIMKid 0
